    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Location, global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Location? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            Name = source.Name,
            City = source.City,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Location source, global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.Id = source.Id;
        destination.Name = source.Name;
        destination.City = source.City;
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Location, global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            Name = src.Name,
            City = src.City,
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.LocationReadModel> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Location> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }
